---
title: "Untitled"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

# Introduction

## About the data

text

# Setup

```{r load packages}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(readr)
library(here)
```


```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
bg_chem <- read_csv(here('data', 'BGchem2008data.csv'))
```
